subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth and beareth glad tidings unto them that have believed in God, their Lord, and in the Day of Resurrection were among the steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و یبشر اللواتی هن آمن بالله ربهن و کن فی یوم القیام لمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @role and station of women, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
